name: Parafin
description: Embedded financing infrastructure API for platforms to offer capital to their merchants.

seo.title: Parafin — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Parafin: Embedded financing infrastructure API for platforms to offer capital to their merchants.

when_to_use: Embedding merchant cash advance offers inside a B2B platform
Automating capital eligibility checks via revenue data API
Providing revenue-based financing to platform merchant base

cons: Capital access depends on merchant data
review.verdict: Strong embedded-capital API for US platforms, but limited to US merchants and platform customers.
review.best_for: US vertical SaaS and marketplace platforms adding capital as a retention lever
review.not_for: Individual merchants or non-US platforms needing direct lending access

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
